zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Christian III von Oldenburg於1229年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格時，他的父親Graf Johann I von Oldenburg23歲，母親Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen17歲。他於大約1280年與Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1285年12月25日在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Christian III von Oldenburg于1229年出生在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 歐登伯格时，他的父亲Graf Johann I von Oldenburg23岁，母亲Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen17岁。他于大约1280年与Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1285年12月25日在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Christian III von Oldenburg was born in 1229, in Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Graf Johann I von Oldenburg, was 23 and his mother, Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen, was 17. He married Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen about 1280. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 25 December 1285, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Christian III von Oldenburg est né en 1229, à Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Johann I von Oldenburg, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen environ 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 25 décembre 1285, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Christian III von Oldenburg 1229 in Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Johann I von Oldenburg 23 und seine Mutter Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen 17. Er hat um 1280 Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Dezember 1285 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Christian III von Oldenburg è nato il nel 1229 nel Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Johann I von Oldenburg, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen circa 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 25 dicembre 1285, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Duitsland: ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オルデンブルグ
ja.Oldenburg, , Lower Saxony, Germany: ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オルデンブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Graf Christian III von Oldenburgが1229年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス オルデンブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Johann I von Oldenburgは23歳，母Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausenは17歳であった。約1280年にHedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1285年12月25日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Christian III von Oldenburg(이)가 1229년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Johann I von Oldenburg(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1285년 12월 25일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Christian III von Oldenburg nasceu em 1229, em Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Johann I von Oldenburg, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen aproximadamente 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de dezembro de 1285, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Christian III von Oldenburg родился в 1229 г. в местности ландкрис олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Johann I von Oldenburg было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen около 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 25 декабря 1285 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Christian III von Oldenburg nació en 1229, en Landkreis Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Johann I von Oldenburg, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Richeza Of Hoya-Stumpenhausen, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Hedwig von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen aproximadamente 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 25 de diciembre de 1285, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
